chunks.text: One day, a letter arrived from my uncle, who lives in a far country.
there were beautiful stamps and a story about his new life.
My uncle is working abroad, and every day
he is learning something new in a foreign culture.
In the letter, there were also photos of an old square and some stone buildings.
and each country has its own culture and tradition,” my uncle wrote.
Looking at the photos, my sister said with shining eyes
“ Someday I want to take a flight and go to a far island.
My uncle will come back to Japan soon.
He wrote, “ Please come to the airport to meet me.
” My sister and I are waiting for that day.
Travel is a time to meet not only new scenes
but also new feelings in ourselves.
